overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit elevated pedestrian walkway in Night City. The player ascends stairs, walks through covered corridors with holographic advertisements, overlooks busy streets below, and observes the vibrant cyberpunk cityscape with towering skyscrapers and reflective wet surfaces.

events.description: reaches top of stairs and enters covered pedestrian walkway

agents.ego_description: ascending wide concrete stairs flanked by teal neon railings into an elevated pedestrian walkway

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red outfit descending the stairs toward camera

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with yellow safety edge markings
teal neon light strips running along metal handrails
teal neon light strips running along metal handrails
large digital advertisement screen above the walkway entrance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a first-person ascent up concrete stairs illuminated by vibrant teal neon railings. The player approaches the entrance to a covered pedestrian walkway, passing a pedestrian in red descending the stairs, and transitions from the stairwell into the neon-lit arcade above.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian arcade with holographic billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered walkway observing holographic advertisements and neon-framed architecture

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in business suit walking toward camera carrying a briefcase

large vertical digital billboard displaying advertisement with figure in red lingerie
large rectangular concrete planter containing palm trees
wet glossy tile flooring reflecting neon lights and advertisements

segments.scene_description: Walking through the covered pedestrian arcade, the camera moves past teal neon structural frames and reflective wet flooring. Large digital billboards display advertisements on the walls while planters with palm trees line the walkway. A pedestrian in a suit approaches from the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated overlook with view of city streets below

events.description: reaches glass railing overlook revealing street view below
camera pans upward to reveal night sky and full moon between skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: pausing at the overlook to observe the street below and surrounding cityscape, then looking up at the sky

entered.detail: glass safety railing providing view of street below
multi-lane city street with moving traffic visible below
large red billboard with white Japanese mask design and text
full moon visible between tall buildings

segments.scene_description: The player reaches an elevated overlook with glass railings, revealing a view of the multi-lane street below with sparse traffic. Large digital billboards including one with a Japanese mask design dominate the right side. The camera pans upward to show the full moon between towering skyscrapers before settling on the urban canyon view.

events.description: passes by NPCs sitting on benches and walking along the promenade

agents.ego_description: continuing along the elevated walkway passing other pedestrians and storefront displays

notable_agents.action: NPC sitting on bench wearing sunglasses and casual clothing

entered.detail: illuminated shop windows and commercial displays along the walkway
large vertical billboard with 'ZEIG DICH' text and figure in red outfit
structural pillars wrapped in bright teal neon lighting

segments.scene_description: Walking along the elevated promenade, the player passes by storefront displays and neon-lit structural pillars. The area has moderate pedestrian activity with an NPC sitting on a bench to the left. A prominent 'ZEIG DICH' billboard is visible on the right wall as the walkway continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: glass floor overlook with city street view

events.description: approaches glass floor section revealing traffic directly below
camera pans up from street level to show surrounding skyscrapers and billboards

agents.ego_description: looking down through glass floor at traffic below then panning to admire the surrounding neon-lit cityscape

entered.detail: transparent glass flooring panels showing street level below
large illuminated sign reading 'JUSUSHI ELECTRONICS' in red neon
tall futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon accents

segments.scene_description: The final segment features a glass floor section revealing traffic moving on the street directly below. The player looks down through the transparent panels before panning up to view the 'JUSUSHI ELECTRONICS' sign and towering skyscrapers surrounding the walkway. The 'ZEIG DICH' billboard remains visible on the right as the camera takes in the expansive cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a confined neon stairwell into an expansive, elevated urban promenade overlooking a futuristic cityscape. It begins with an ascent up concrete stairs illuminated by teal neon railings, passing a descending pedestrian before transitioning into a covered arcade characterized by reflective wet floors and digital billboards. As the camera moves past palm trees and passing commuters, the scene opens onto an elevated overlook where the view expands to reveal multi-lane streets and a full moon framed by towering skyscrapers. The movement continues along the promenade past storefronts and a prominent ZEIG DICH billboard, eventually shifting focus downward toward a transparent glass floor section that exposes the traffic flowing below. Finally, the camera pans upward from the glass panels to take in the surrounding urban canyon, settling on the glowing JUSUSHI ELECTRONICS sign amidst the dense skyline.
